name: spinner-color
visual_summary: The spinner-color component is a circular loading indicator that changes color as it animates. It is typically used on forms or pages that take a significant amount of time to load. Developers can use it to provide a visual cue to users about the status of their requests.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: spinner-color
Description: The spinner-color component is a circular loading indicator that changes color as it animates. It is typically used on forms or pages that take a significant amount of time to load. Developers can use it to provide a visual cue to users about the status of their requests.
Style: minimal, flat
Interactions: animated, rotating
Tags: loading, indicator, colorful, animation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
